## 🏷️ Type

<!-- Check one -->

- [ ] 🧬 Feature (new capability)
- [ ] 🩹 Fix (something was broken)
- [ ] 💅 Polish (looks/feels better, nothing broken before)
- [ ] 📝 Docs (words, not code)
- [ ] 🔧 Infra (CI, deploy, deps, config)

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] No console errors in browser
- [ ] Mobile tested (or doesn't apply)
- [ ] Spec compliance (`pnpm spec check all`) — or explain why not
